title: Reject committed local environment files
summary: Local secrets and machine-specific environment files must not be committed.

check.command: git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && git diff --cached --name-only | python3 -c "import sys; bad=[p for p in sys.stdin.read().splitlines() if p in {'.env', '.env.local'} or p.endswith('/.env') or p.endswith('/.env.local')]; sys.exit(1 if bad else 0)"

enforcement.message: Local .env files are staged. Unstage them and commit a documented example file instead.

hard_gate_evidence.project_local_enablement: Enabled by this project's policy because secret-like env files are never valid release artifacts.
hard_gate_evidence.soft_soak_period: Ran as a warning-only pre-commit check before HARD adoption.
hard_gate_evidence.independent_recurrence_or_audited_mainta: Confirmed by maintainer audit of environment-file leak risk.
hard_gate_evidence.deterministic_check: The staged path list is deterministic for a given index state.
hard_gate_evidence.low_false_positive_rate: Only blocks exact local env filenames, not documented example files.
hard_gate_evidence.rollback_available: Disable this project-local rule or unstage the env file and commit .env.example instead.
hard_gate_evidence.eval_record: Project eval record links the env-file risk and passing staged-file check.
hard_gate_evidence.audit_trail: Decision log records promotion from soft to adopted_hard.
